response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates 20+ years of solid software development experience and strong engineering practices, this role requires native-level Japanese language proficiency—a critical requirement entirely absent from the resume. Additionally, the position demands deep expertise in embedded networking security (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, device attack detection) and Linux kernel work, where his background shows minimal relevant experience. His career is primarily in web and backend development, not embedded systems or security.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software development with proven ability to work across web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded systems domains
Strong engineering discipline demonstrated through consistent adoption of TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices across multiple senior roles
Accomplished technical leader with multiple staff-level positions and successful open-source project ownership
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit required qualification for this role
No demonstrated expertise in embedded security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption, device attack detection, tamper detection) that are core to the position
Limited recent C programming experience and no evidence of Linux kernel analysis or source-code modification capability required for embedded firmware development
